name: CyberSecPro
description: WhatsApp Bot Management SaaS — link numbers via pairing codes, manage sessions from a cyberpunk dashboard.

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB connection string (recommended). Get a free cluster at mongodb.com/atlas. Example: mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster.mongodb.net/cybersecpro. If left blank, the Heroku PostgreSQL addon is used instead.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Auto-injected by the Heroku PostgreSQL addon — leave blank.

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for signing JWT auth tokens. Auto-generated if left blank.

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email for the auto-created admin account on first boot.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the auto-created admin account (min 6 chars).

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: Must be false so devDependencies are available during the React build step.
